briefdescription.para: Map of string transition symbols to symbol values.
Next value to be used for a newly added symbol.
Get a set of all symbols in the alphabet.

detaileddescription.para: The result does not have to equal the list of symbols in the automaton using this alphabet.

briefdescription.para: complement of a set of symbols wrt the alphabet
Translate internal symbol representation back to its original string name.

detaileddescription.para:
Throws an exception when the symbol is missing in the alphabet.
symbol
Symbol to translate.
symbol original name.

briefdescription.para: Expand alphabet by symbols from the passed symbols.

detaileddescription.para:
Adding a symbol name which already exists will throw an exception.
symbols
Vector of symbols to add.

briefdescription.para: Expand alphabet by symbols from the passed alphabet.
translates a string into a symbol
Translate sequence of symbol names to sequence of their respective values.
Add new symbol to the alphabet with the value identical to its string representation.

simplesect.para: Result of the insertion as InsertionResult.

briefdescription.para: Add new symbol to the alphabet.

parameterdescription.para: Number of the symbol to be used on transitions.

simplesect.para: Result of the insertion as InsertionResult.

briefdescription.para: Get the next value for a potential new symbol.
Get the number of existing symbols, epsilon symbols excluded.
Checks whether the alphabet has any symbols.
Update next symbol value when appropriate.

detaileddescription.para:
When the newly inserted value is larger or equal to the current next symbol value, update the next symbol value to a value one larger than the new value.
value
The value of the newly added symbol.

briefdescription.para: Erase a symbol from the alphabet.
Remove a symbol name value pair from the position pos from the alphabet.

simplesect.para: Iterator following the last removed element.

briefdescription.para: Remove a symbol name value pair from the positions between first and last from the alphabet.

simplesect.para: Iterator following the last removed element.

briefdescription.para: also translates strings to symbols
Check whether two alphabets are equal.

detaileddescription.para:
In general, two alphabets are equal if and only if they are of the same class instance.
other_alphabet
The other alphabet to compare with for equality.
True if equal, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check whether two alphabets are equal.

detaileddescription.para:
In general, two alphabets are equal if and only if they are of the same class instance.
other_alphabet
The other alphabet to compare with for equality.
True if equal, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enumerated alphabet using a set of integers as symbols maintaining a set of specified symbols.

detaileddescription.para: EnumAlphabet is a version of direct (identity) alphabet (does not give names to symbols, their name is their integer value directly). However, unlike IntAlphabet, EnumAlphabet maintains an ordered set of symbols in the alphabet.
Therefore, calling member functions get_complement() and get_alphabet_symbols() makes sense in the context of EnumAlphabet and the functions give the expected results.
